main.description: Tracks a player's progress through a quest. Each record represents one active or completed quest instance, holding triggers that advance the quest, a key-value state bag, and a task checklist.

questId.description: Identifier for the quest definition this state tracks.

triggers.description: Active triggers that can advance this quest. Each trigger fires when a specific game event occurs.

state.description: Key-value state bag for this quest instance. Behaviors and triggers read and write these values to track quest progress.

tasks.description: Checklist of objectives for this quest. Displayed to the player as a task list.

itemInteractionTrigger.description: Fires when the player interacts with a specific item.

item.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.item record.

npcInteractionTrigger.description: Fires when the player interacts with a specific NPC.

npc.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.npc record.

enterRoomTrigger.description: Fires when the player enters a specific room.

room.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.room record.

exitRoomTrigger.description: Fires when the player leaves a room through a specific exit.

room.description: Strong reference to the at.cozy-corner.room record the exit belongs to.

exitId.description: The ID of the exit within the room.

questStateUpdatedTrigger.description: Fires when another quest's state is updated. Allows quest chaining and dependencies.

quest.description: The questId of the quest whose state update fires this trigger.

stateEntry.description: A single key-value pair in the quest state bag.

task.description: A single quest objective shown to the player.

id.description: Unique identifier for this task within the quest.

completed.description: Whether this task has been completed.
